_comment: Content blueprint for the LISRAYA email

content_blueprint.rationale: States approved positioning verbatim as requested
content_blueprint.copy_outline: LISRAYA is the first and only FDA-approved targeted treatment for adults with dermatomyositis.
content_blueprint.design_concept: Idea/mood — a warm, sunlit 'first and only, now real' arrival moment: optimistic, confident, patients-back-to-life, the opening note of the email. Palette in play — full-bleed photographic band edge-to-edge at 600px with a solid Brand Blue #00529b fallback behind the image (Outlook drop-safe); headline copy sits on a White #ffffff surface directly beneath the photo so type never fights the busy lakeside; headline ink Brand Blue #00529b, 'first and only' carried as the one bolded focal phrase in Brand Blue ExtraBold while running body sits Graphite #212121; a single thin Gold #ffc60a hairline rule (2px, ~70% of text width) tucks under the headline as the brand's signature underscore. Typography — headline Nunito Sans ExtraBold, Title Case at H1 display scale (≈28/36), no all-caps; body Nunito Sans Regular 16/24, generous and calm; establish 'dermatomyositis (DM)' here at first mention. Layout/composition — stacked single column: the panoramic couple-and-dog photo runs full-bleed as the top third with the existing 'NOW APPROVED' corner flag preserved as the eye's first landing point, then a White text block at 24px side insets with the positioning sentence left-aligned; the photo is cropped into the brand Accent shape (large 120px radius top-left + bottom-right, 6px on the opposite pair) so even the hero obeys the container language. Components — full-bleed accent-shape hero image with descriptive alt text ('couple walking their dog along a lakeside trail at sunset'); beneath i

visuals.description: [PHOTO] A wide, panoramic color photograph of a middle-aged couple walking a medium-sized, curly-fur dog along a lakeside trail at sunset or early evening. The woman, in the foreground, has blonde hair tucked under a navy baseball cap, wear

content_blueprint.clinical_fact_covered: First and only FDA-approved targeted treatment for adult DM

content_blueprint.rationale: Conveys dosing convenience verbatim in callout
content_blueprint.copy_outline: LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home with no infusions or shots needed.
content_blueprint.design_concept: Idea/mood — a crisp 'one pill, your life, no clinic' proof point that feels reassuring and effortless, the brand's signature half-on/half-off badge doing the talking. Palette in play — section sits on White #ffffff (distinct from neighbors) with the Icon Callout Box in Light Blue #E6F0F9 fill; headline text Brand Blue #00529b ExtraBold; the white #ffffff icon badge straddles the box's left edge carrying the Brand Blue line-art dosing icon and a Dark Navy #011E45 low-opacity drop shadow (0 4px 10px rgba(1,30,69,0.18)) so it lifts off the blue; 'once-daily' is the single bolded key phrase. Typography — Nunito Sans ExtraBold ~21/28 for the callout statement, left-aligned and vertically centered to the box; no body paragraph competes — the box IS the message. Layout/composition — single full-width callout inset from the left by 40px (W/2) so the 80px badge overhangs with its center exactly on the box edge, badge vertically centered, copy padded clear of it (left padding ~64px); the eye lands on the '1x' dosing badge then reads rightward into the convenience claim. Components — the mandated Icon Callout Box: Light Blue accent shape with border-radius 40px 8px 40px 8px, white badge mirroring at 20px 4px 20px 4px, the picked 1x oblong-pill-with-arrow icon (id bc743a3f) seated in the badge at ~48px reinforcing 'once-daily, no shots'; Outlook degrade accepted (badge flush inner-left) with every other rule intact. Density/rhythm — tight, compact, and high-contrast — a single punchy bea

icons.description: [ICON] A flat, two-tone blue line-art icon depicting a single oblong pill at its center, with a short straight score line etched across the tablet’s midpoint. Encircling the pill is a partial circular arrow, beginning at the lower left, cur

content_blueprint.clinical_fact_covered: Once-daily oral pill, no infusions or shots needed

content_blueprint.rationale: Mandatory CTA using verbatim provided copy
content_blueprint.copy_outline: Talk to your doctor about how LISRAYA can help → Button: 'Visit LISRAYA.com'
content_blueprint.design_concept: Idea/mood — the warm, decisive 'go talk to your doctor' send-off: the brand's sunshine gradient banner closing the email on optimism and action. Palette in play — full-width gradient PNG background (the approved Gradient_callout asset, bright yellow→deep orange) sized cover/no-repeat/center with a mandatory solid Sunshine #faa31b fallback for Outlook; headline in Brand Blue #00529b for guaranteed contrast on the warm field; single button filled Deep Blue #003D74 with White #ffffff label and a Gold #FFC20E chevron '›'. Typography — headline Nunito Sans weight 800 ~28px, one line, centered in the top third, Title Case; button label Nunito Sans 800 18px. Layout/composition — centered single column, headline stacked in the upper third and the lone button in the lower-middle, nothing else competing — one focal action, dead-center; 48px top / 56px bottom padding holds it as a confident terminal band. Components — the locked Gradient Callout CTA: 248×64px Deep Blue button bearing the signature asymmetric radius 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px (never simplified), Gold chevron after two non-breaking spaces, linking to LISRAYA.com; exactly one primary CTA. Density/rhythm — bold, saturated, and singular — the loudest color moment of the whole email, a warm exclamation point that contrasts the cool blue restraint above and leaves the reader on a clear next step before the locked ISI footer.

visuals.name: Gradient_callout.png
visuals.description: [OTHER] Solid horizontal gradient background transitioning from bright yellow on the left to deep orange on the right with a smooth color blend. No additional visual elements or text present.
